0.q: The salt-tolerant genes PagCERK1, PagNCED3a, PagNCED3b, PagCAT2, and PagPOD16 were found to be regulated through PagMTC-mediated hypermethylation, as determined by MeRIP-seq, MeRIP-qPCR, and mRNA stability assay.
